atomicity.message: Staged payload contains only the guided lint init wizard flow and its tests.

conditions.message: The staged lint-init wizard code is formatted, diff-check clean, and keeps executable lint setup explicit rather than fake enforcement.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2736: git diff --cached --check exited clean.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: gofmt -l on cmd/burpvalve/lint_init.go and lint_init_test.go printed no files in an isolated staged-slice worktree.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: inspected lint_init.go and confirmed declined scoped setup is metadata plus warnings; executable commands still flow through LintManifestUpdate.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: focused lint-init wizard tests passed in an isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: Wizard logic is factored through shared plan/build/apply helpers instead of duplicating write and preview behavior.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: inspected buildLintInitResult, applyLintInitWrites, collectLintInitWizardPlan, lintInitWizardCommands, lintInitCoverageData, and lintInitDetectionCoverage.
BrightOwl message 2733: buildLintInitResult and applyLintInitWrites share command proposal, coverage, and recommendation helpers rather than separate mutation logic.

conditions.message: The wizard does not let reduced lint coverage masquerade as full coverage.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: collectLintInitWizardPlan asks scoped-root question only when Detection.NeedsScopedSetup, defaults Yes, records DeclinedRoots/DeclinedAt on decline, switches to repo-root commands only, and final write confirmation defaults false.
BrightOwl message 2733: lintInitRecommendations says proposed commands must be reviewed and run before treating coverage as enforced; lintInitDetectionCoverage marks declined roots partial.
BrightOwl message 2733: tests assert declined scoped setup warning and persisted lint_coverage declined_roots/declined_at, accepted polyglot coverage, and default-No no mutation.

conditions.message: The prompt/model control-flow changes have nearby tests covering the acceptance-critical wizard states.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: treated one-function-one-test as governed because the payload is prompt/model control flow.

BrightOwl message 2733: tests cover detect no-mutation, write confirmation, robot confirmation, declined scoped coverage, accepted polyglot coverage, single-root no scoped question, final No-default cancel no-mutation, and preview content.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: staged tests add declined scoped setup, accepted scoped setup, single-root, and final confirmation No/cancel no-mutation coverage.

conditions.message: The staged payload implements the guided lint init scope, reduced-coverage, No-default confirmation, and no-install/no-project-script-edit requirements with focused and full tests passing.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: bead requires scoped setup prompts for multi-root/polyglot repos, skipped scoped questions for single-root, durable declined coverage, final confirmation default No, no dependency installs/project script edits, and tests for accepted/declined/cancel flows.

BrightOwl message 2733: inspected lint_init.go and confirmed scoped prompt/default Yes, per-command required/timeout/scope/run-dir/serial prompts, final write confirmation default No, reduced coverage data, and repo-root-only command selection on decline.
BrightOwl message 2733: clean staged snapshot focused lint-init wizard tests passed and full go test ./... passed.

conditions.message: Verifier evidence is recorded with hash binding, staged-path confirmation, code inspection, and command results.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2736: read /tmp/lint-wizard-verifier-prompts.json and confirmed staged hash sha256:6293b08f31e65041e101145e632d8ef479cba8d94ad83b63264a5e6f3665df8e, manifest hash sha256:00e2a9854cb8dcbdde3e942841f405f13b196fd8b3ebe884380dd9f8c0fc8df5, and 13 condition packets.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: independently regenerated verifier prompts and got the same staged and manifest hashes with only the two lint_init paths hash-included.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: git diff --cached --name-status/stat showed exactly two files and 541 insertions/6 deletions.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: full go test ./... passed in an isolated staged-slice worktree.

conditions.message: The staged payload is scoped to the lint init wizard only.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: git diff --cached --name-status and --stat showed only cmd/burpvalve/lint_init.go and cmd/burpvalve/lint_init_test.go, 541 insertions and 6 deletions.
BrightOwl message 2733: verifier packet binds the lint-wizard feature paths to sha256:6293b08f31e65041e101145e632d8ef479cba8d94ad83b63264a5e6f3665df8e.

conditions.message: The governed mutation surface is limited to existing Burpvalve manifest/recommendation write helpers and remains gated by explicit confirmation.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: searched staged lint_init.go for os.WriteFile, WriteLint/PlanLint, package.json, npm, go get, exec, and Command; no os.WriteFile, exec.Command, dependency install, or package.json/script write appears.

BrightOwl message 2733: runLintInit writes only when --write is active and confirmed by force/robotConfirm or interactive confirmation; otherwise it returns confirmation_required or cancelled before mutation.

conditions.message: Declined scope data is durable and structured in lint_coverage only after confirmed write, while preview/cancel paths leave the manifest unchanged.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: lintInitCoverageData carries DeclinedRoots/DeclinedAt into LintManifestUpdate; lintInitDetectionCoverage sets status partial and exposes unchecked/declined roots.

BrightOwl message 2733: declined scoped setup test verifies manifest contains lint_coverage, declined_roots, web, and declined_at after confirmed write; cancel/default-No test verifies manifest unchanged.
BrightOwl message 2733: git diff --cached --check reported no whitespace or patch-format errors.

conditions.message: The staged wizard only reads local detection results and writes Burpvalve-owned files after confirmation; it does not add network access, secrets handling, external API calls, package installation, or tenant/PII surfaces.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: searched lint_init.go for DetectLintSetup, WriteLintManifestUpdate, WriteLintRulesRecommendationsUpdate, exec, http, token, secret, package.json, scripts; code uses local DetectLintSetup and Burpvalve write helpers with no exec/http/token/secret handling or project script edit path.
BrightOwl message 2733: only cmd/burpvalve/lint_init.go and cmd/burpvalve/lint_init_test.go are staged, so no package/project config files or CI hooks are directly modified.

conditions.message: No governed visual-regression surface is present in this staged payload.
evidence: ScarletMarsh message 2736: visual-regression governs screenshot, browser, responsive layout, canvas, and visual-diff checks for UI work.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: staged payload is limited to Go CLI lint-init prompt/control-flow code and Go tests, with no browser UI, canvas, CSS, responsive layout, image, or visual-diff surface.
ScarletMarsh message 2736: prompt behavior changes are covered by lint-init tests rather than visual regression tooling.

conditions.message: The wizard adds linear prompt/preview work over detected candidate commands and roots, with no unbounded concurrency or expensive background execution.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: loops are linear over detected commands/roots and no command execution path is added to the wizard.
BrightOwl message 2733: clean staged snapshot focused lint-init wizard tests passed quickly after reproducing the packet hash.

conditions.message: The wizard requires explicit user confirmation for writes, defaults final confirmation to No, does not self-install dependencies or edit project scripts/configs, and records reduced scope instead of silently asserting complete coverage.
evidence: BrightOwl message 2733: --write requires force/robotConfirm or interactive confirmation; JSON/noninteractive write without confirmation fails closed; cancelled confirmation returns no-files-changed.
BrightOwl message 2733: final wizard prompt "Write these lint setup changes?" has Default false.
BrightOwl message 2733: tests cover confirmation-required robot/nonrobot paths, final No-default cancel no-mutation, and durable reduced coverage for declined scoped setup.
